title: database management system (DBMS)
text: database management system (DBMS) A program that lets one or more computer users create and access data in a database. In handling user requests, the DBMS ensures the integrity of the data (that is, making sure it continues to be accessible and is consistently organized as intended) and security (making sure only those with access privileges can access the data). For Uniface, we speak of record-level DBMSs (not file management systems) and RDBMSs for relational DBMS systems. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
